response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust in geospatial routing pipelines, which are core requirements; their work in GIS is mostly web-based using DLang and Node.js, not the high-performance, low-latency systems needed for routing tiles, and they show no evidence of distributed systems expertise or navigation data pipeline experience.
strengths: Strong open-source contributions in geospatial tools (GISCollective)
Extensive full-stack experience across languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex data systems at scale
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or geospatial pipelines
Lack of demonstrated expertise in distributed systems, fault tolerance, or real-time data consistency
Primary tech stack (DLang, Node.js, TypeScript) does not align with required C++/Rust focus
